files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "dl_large_count_saturates_from_cursor",
+  "description": "DL with count larger than remaining region span saturates from cursor to region bottom",
+  "initial_size": [5, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41 1b5b3248 42 1b5b3348 43 1b5b3448 44 1b5b3548 45 1b5b323b3472 1b5b333b3148 1b5b31304d",
+  "comment": "Fill rows 0..4 with A..E at col 0. Set DECSTBM(2,4) -> region rows 1..3. CUP(3,1) places cursor at row 2. DL(10) clamps to available lines (rows 2..3): both become blank, row 1 remains B, rows 0 and 4 unchanged.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 2, "col": 0 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 3, "col": 0, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 4, "col": 0, "char": "E" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "il_large_count_saturates_from_cursor",
+  "description": "IL with count larger than remaining region span saturates from cursor to region bottom",
+  "initial_size": [5, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41 1b5b3248 42 1b5b3348 43 1b5b3448 44 1b5b3548 45 1b5b323b3472 1b5b333b3148 1b5b31304c",
+  "comment": "Fill rows 0..4 with A..E at col 0. Set DECSTBM(2,4) -> region rows 1..3. CUP(3,1) places cursor at row 2. IL(10) clamps to available lines (rows 2..3): both become blank, row 1 remains B, rows 0 and 4 unchanged.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 2, "col": 0 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 3, "col": 0, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 4, "col": 0, "char": "E" }
+    ]
+  }
+}
